programme.title: On the Case: No One To Trust
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl vanishes on a desolate stretch of highway. Could the man in charge of the investigation be responsible?

programme.title: On the Case: This is for Her
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion leaves a father of three dead. Why was the victim's wife, the only eyewitness to the crime left alive?

programme.title: On the Case: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: When a 26 year old wife and mother vanishes, investigators wonder if she simply just ran away or if it was something far more sinister. The search for answers would take nearly a decade and lead her family on a dark journey they could never have imagined.

programme.title: On the Case: Mixed Signals
programme.desc: Cell phone records may help solve the disturbing murder of a popular teenager.

programme.title: On the Case: In the Wind
programme.desc: A daughter's quest to see her birth mother's murder solved is complicated when police discover the prime suspect is in the wind.

programme.title: On the Case: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence and a videotape of their suspect, yet they still struggle to find a vicious killer.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land in a world where internal combustion engines are outlawed; Mallory (Robert Floyd) falls for an employee (guest star Lisa Akey) of a major gas company and leader of an outlaw biker gang.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) has hallucinations about Wade (guest star Sabrina Lloyd) and eventually enters a vortex that leads the Sliders to a Kromagg military complex where she is being held.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders arrive at Oakwood Institute, which appears to be a sort of mental hospital.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Fast-food workers in clown costumes chase the Sliders to a resort where Maggie (Kari Wuhrer) is traumatized by a sadistic, virtual reality Civil War game.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After being dumped in the middle of the Pacific ocean, the Sliders are rescued by a merchant ship populated by a band of pirates.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders must pull off the heist of a precious gem that they need to fix their malfunctioning timer.

programme.title: Moesha: Graduation Day
programme.desc: Dorian’s new older girlfriend is enticing him with promises of a record deal, while Mo and Hakeem fight about trust.

programme.title: Moesha: Paying The Piper
programme.desc: Hakeem asks Moesha to move in with him, and Dorian’s past comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: Moesha: Pilot
programme.desc: Moesha clashes with her new stepmother. When she ignores Dee’s grounding and goes to the local hangout, the Den, her heart is broken when she finds Ohagi, the boy she likes, with another girl.

programme.title: Moesha: Friends
programme.desc: The meaning of Moesha’s and Kim’s friendship is tested when they both try out for the cheerleading team -- and Kim gets picked, and Moesha doesn’t.

programme.title: Moesha: Hakeem Owes Moesha Big
programme.desc: Moesha and her father coach Hakeem on how to get a job. As a result, the owner of a sporting goods store (Bo Jackson) hires him.

programme.title: Moesha: Sixteen
programme.desc: Moesha is now officially allowed to date because she is turning sixteen, although Frank remains extremely reluctant.

programme.title: Moesha: Reunion
programme.desc: Moesha’s father arranges a reunion of Moesha’s childhood playgroup (his motive is to sell Saturns).

programme.title: Moesha: Million Boy March
programme.desc: Moesha and Kim attend a church youth group designed to build leadership, but they experience resistance from the leader of the event because they are female.

programme.title: Moesha: Driving Miss Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha gets her driver’s license but refuses Frank’s gift of a Saturn, preferring to earn her own money for her dream car -- a new Jeep.

programme.title: Moesha: Chain Chain Chain
programme.desc: A chain letter stirs up trouble and causes havoc with Moesha’s family and friends.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly throws a birthday party for Stuart and Nicki, but her real motive is to impress a guy she's just met who's new in town. Nicki and Stuart's dad shows up and ruins everything.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell plans to attend a big event honoring him for his past bowling glory, but is quarantined with Phil and Stuart. Holly secretly rewrites Eden's college paper and almost destroys her dream.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang attends a charity silent auction. Haskell wins a police ride-along. Phil wins dinner with his favorite sitcom TV Mom. Stuart and Holly are forced to share a cooking lesson with a celebrity chef.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly sneaks into a sorority Eden is pledging to find out why she was rejected years ago. Haskell turns the guys' apartment into a pretend AirBnB to attract a woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, over the moon, introduces the gang to her new boyfriend, Congressman Charles Hayward, but they soon begin to question his motives.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s engagement to Congressman Charles Hayward is put in jeopardy when a scandalous photo of her lands in the newspaper. Haskell has an idea for a great new app, but needs an investor.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's big day arrives. Haskell and Nicki, now business partners, strike it rich.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly is given a voice-activated operating system as a gift and gets way too attached to him. Haskell comes into money and uses it to control Phil and Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, tired of all the drama that comes with dating, decides to only pursue men she’s not interested in. Haskell takes all his money out of the bank to show it off.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart recruits Phil for his a cappella group and Phil leads a rebellion. Haskell leaves Holly out of his will and she seeks revenge.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s sister Nicki comes back from her European vacation with a female lover. Holly, inspired by Nicki, decides to try dating women.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s stint on a movie set leads to romance with the female star. Holly struggles with having to fire someone for the first time.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Monster of Miramichi
programme.desc: Firemen are called to a blaze and discover two sisters, one dead and the other on death's door. Detectives learn that a man snuck in and brutally sexually assaulted the sisters before setting fire to the house.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case
programme.desc: On July 19th 2004, the naked and tied up body of a woman is recovered in the Ourcq canal in Fresnes-sur-Marne. The victim is impossible to identify.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Nelly Crémel Case
programme.desc: Nelly Crémel, 39, leaves her home to go jogging. Eight days later, after a vast search campaign, her body is found. There's no doubt that it's murder. The case soon ignites public opinion, even inflaming passions at the highest level of the state.

programme.title: Scorpion: Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must put aside their personal and romantic predicaments when anonymous hackers with unknown motives take control of U.S. military aircraft and warships and point weapons at American cities.

programme.title: Scorpion: And More Civil War
programme.desc: Just as Team Scorpion makes headway against the hackers controlling U.S. naval destroyers, they learn that a U.S. nuclear submarine also has been hacked and has a missile about to launch.

programme.title: Scorpion: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: When Walter is accidentally launched into space in a rocket, he hallucinates about Paige as his oxygen runs low, and Team Scorpion works feverishly to find a way to bring him home before he suffocates.

programme.title: Scorpion: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must find a boy from Ralph's class who goes missing on a field trip after he accidentally has a run-in with a deadly criminal. Also, Toby gets closer to finding out the identity of Happy's husband.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plight At The Museum
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Scorpion: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Before Halloween, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a deep, vast cave system in order to prevent a bat population from destroying the North America ecosystem.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: Andy’s romance with Det. Luke Callaghan gets complicated when he chooses her for a special assignment -serving a search warrant for a bullet lodged in the head of a witness to murder.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Hot & Bothered
programme.desc: A severe heat wave wreaks havoc on the city, forcing the rookies to work around the clock to keep the peace. In the midst of the chaos, Andy discovers that a serial rapist may have resurfaced to prey on vulnerable teenage girls.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Honour Roll
programme.desc: After their High School Outreach assignment goes awry, Andy and Chris stumble on the victim of avicious beating behind a nightclub.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girlfriend of the Year
programme.desc: After a routine speed trap leads to a messy accident on a city highway, Chris and Gail find one of the cars mysteriously empty and quickly realize that itslicense plate matches the one being broadcast in a citywide “Amber Alert”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Big Nickel
programme.desc: Andy’s attempt to avoid Swarek is thwarted whenbothare assigned to a prisoner transport. When things go awry and theinmate breaks loose, the two officers are led on a cat-and-mouse foot chase through the meandering woods.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: What was to be a routine day for Andy is abruptly put on holdwhen herex-copper father, Tommy, confesses that he might have committed a serious crime during one of his alcohol-induced blackouts

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Paris, France to find a stolen locket, so they can clear Sydney's dead grandmother of the charges.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Dagger of Death
programme.desc: India, 500 A.D.: A precious dagger is used in human sacrifices to goddess Kali. Sydney must return a relic to India for her fellow hunter, who believes the dagger made him kill his assistant.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Last of the Mochicas
programme.desc: On a search for a South American Mochica Indian relic of protection, Nigel and his colleagues get captured by local guerrillas. It's up to Sydney and ally Jason Clark to save them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fertile Ground
programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Guests Russell Kane and Lolly Adefope join Dara for a five-round gaming challenge. Along the way, they fight it out on `Ghosts 'n Goblins', `Lemmings', and `Get Your Baps Out' to prove they are the best.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Edith Bowman and Elis James join Dara and the team captains to compete against each other in a five-round gaming challenge on titles including `Mega Man 2', `Snowboard Party' and `Street Fighter V'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Dara and the team captains are joined by Rob Beckett and Zoe Lyons. Over the course of five rounds, the two teams do battle on games including `Gran Turismo', `Horace Goes Skiing' and `Goat Simulator'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Dara hosts a five-round gaming contest between two teams that each feature a guest. Sara Cox and Daniel Sloss battle it out on games including `Wipeout', `FIFA 17' and `Crossy Road'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Dara and the others are joined by comedians Ellie Taylor and Jon Richardson for a five-round gaming contest. Along the way, Ellie and Jon battle it out on retro games including `Crash Team Racing' and `Aztec Challenge'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Vernon Kay and Bec Hill join Dara as guests in a five-round gaming contest. As they battle it out for their teams, they compete against each other on `Tapper', `Call of Duty', and `What the Box'.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is a story of one man’s obsession to find a lost Spanish Galleon loaded with treasure. He risked everything – and faced terrible personal tragedy in his quest.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A young archaeologist risks everything in his quest to find one of the world’s greatest treasures – the fabled lost library of Ivan the Terrible.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Mysterious and bizarre deaths happen when an amateur prospector searches for lost Aztec treasure. Is this the curse of Montezuma’s Treasure at work?

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Forensic pathologist Dr Philippe Charlier, known to the French as the “Indiana Jones of the graveyards” faces his biggest challenge yet: to uncover the truth behind the remains of France’s most famous daughter – Joan of Arc.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: When a British Spy and adventurer goes on a quest to find the mythical Labyrinth, he uncovers a secret that rewrites history…

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A local newspaper editor and businessman in South Africa unwittingly finds himself at the epicentre of a legend of buried gold that began during the Boer War.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: What's Wrong With Pluto
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's famous detective faces the ultimate challenge when enormous monsters attack London.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Pennsylvannia Gun
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to Sussex to investigate the murder of Squire Douglas, who was shot to death in a sealed-up castle, with only two apparent suspects.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Minnie, a cowgirl from a travelling western show, visits Holmes after she finds a dead body in her room.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A cowgirl from a visiting rodeo show asks Sherlock Holmes to help her when she discovers a dead man in her hotel room.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman mistakenly has her ball switched for a real croquet ball that kills a Parliament member.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Neurotic Detective
programme.desc: Watson believes Holmes is a criminal mastermind, but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An advice columnist turns to Holmes when a man badly beats him and threatens a young woman's life.

programme.title: Pursuit to Algiers
programme.desc: Holmes is recruited to escort the heir to a European throne safely back to his homeland after his father's assassination.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Australian Alps
programme.desc: It may come as a surprise to non-Australians that the island continent renowned for its flat plains and searing deserts has snow-capped mountains at all.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: How have Indonesia’s remote and mysterious islands become home to so many of the natural world’s most extraordinary giants? From a unique species of elephant, and the world’s longest snake, to a crab almost a metre wide that climbs trees

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Southwest China - China’s Secret Garden
programme.desc: Tucked away in China’s southwest corner is a hidden oasis unlike any other. Snow-capped mountains, temperate valleys and tropical jungles are home to a spectacular array of wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Antarctic
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel brings his wild fabrication skills into the world of Volkswagen bugs, as he turns a stock bug into a full custom.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel enters the motorcycle world as he tries to turn a childhood dream into a reality by building a wild chopper trike from the ground up.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel transforms an old 1931 Ford jalopy into a street burning hot rod and attempts to bring back one of his wildest creations.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel digs out an old 1960’s dune buggy and brings it back to life with a modern twist.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel transforms a beat?up 1955 Oldsmobile into a classic custom. Part 1 of 2

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel continues the transformation of a beat up '55 Oldsmobile into a classic custom and takes on a Henry J chop top. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Dog Is Smokin'
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his tooth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Snooze, You Lose
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Dog goes on his a case, which involves Bobby, who's been on parole for three months pending sentencing on an assault charge. Bobby's girlfriend wants him back in jail, and Dog agrees that the Bobby needs to be behind bars.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Moms & Dads
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Do Unto Others
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Helping Hand
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread
programme.desc: When the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread, it escalates into a full-on cornbread cook off. Meanwhile, when Jep, Martin, and Godwin play a practical joke on Uncle Si, it ends up being Si who has the last laugh.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a one-day rodeo fantasy camp where they learn the ins and outs of riding, roping and clowning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: After leaving school to pursue music, Jase feels that Reed needs some structure in his life, so he hires him to take his place at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing
programme.desc: Willie and Jase run against each other to become president of their neighborhood HOA. Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Automation Frustration
programme.desc: Willie buys a 3D printer for the office that starts off as a fun distraction for the guys until it appears the printer could soon replace their jobs. Si is upset that Willie invested in the 3D printer and didn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Razing the Snakes
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole try to fight back a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Uneasy Rider
programme.desc: Willie puts Little Will on a budget for his first car but it backfires when Will decides to get a motorcycle instead. Jase and the guys are inspired to design a product using zip lines that will revolutionize duck hunting.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Willie Hunting
programme.desc: While many of the guys' wives and children are in Africa doing charity work, Willie and Jase get into a debate over tracking ability which leads to a challenge--can Jase and Si track and capture Willie and Jep?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sleep Cover
programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: In With the "In" Crowd
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use, but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: With Love, The Claus
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Country Doctor
programme.desc: A country doctor refuses to slow down and seems to be working himself to death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Time in a Bottle
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Back to Oakland
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again, and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Security Threat
programme.desc: When your day job involves the oversight of missile silos, nuclear facilities or a military base, the last complication you want is a close encounter with a UFO...

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 14
programme.desc: Alien Gods of Egypt. Experts scrutinise the engineering behind the Egyptians' Sphinx and pyramids. Could this advanced civilisation have received extra-terrestrial help?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 13
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 12
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Earth Portals: Experts unravel the secrets of the universe's earth portals: shortcuts through space that allow travellers to span vast distances in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 6
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Titans (Part 1) and (Part 2)
programme.desc: Krystle is held at Delta Rho Farms while Rita impersonates her at the mansion; Dex is captured in Moldavia; The Colby family arrives in Denver to attend Blake's party; Jeff spots Fallon among the guests.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Decision
programme.desc: Dex orchestrates a dramatic rescue in Moldavia; Jeff discovers a clue to Fallon's whereabouts; Little Blake realizes Rita is not Krystle; Dominique places a mysterious overseas call.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Proposal
programme.desc: After reaching safety, a paralyzed King Galen is hospitalized; Joel poses as a doctor to gain entry to the mansion; Claudia inherits and oil well; Rita drugs Blake; Galen makes Alexis a powerful promise from his hospital bed.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Close Call
programme.desc: Sammy Jo panics at Blake's possible discovery of Krystle's captivity; Claudia plots with Adam to ger her oil well back; Galen promises to make Alexis a pwerful woman as he attempts to regain the throne.

programme.title: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In the longest campaign of the Second World War, from 1939 to 1945, German submarines desperately try to sever Britain’s shipping lifeline across the Atlantic Ocean. Canada plays the central role in the campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Not One Step Back: The Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: In the summer of 1942, the Germans advance to seize the rich oilfields of the Caucasus. In their path, the city of Stalingrad, its Soviet defenders personally ordered by Stalin to “take not one step back".

programme.title: War Story: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Royal Canadian Air Force bombing operations play a crucial role in disrupting German infrastructure ahead of the Normandy invasion of June 1944. In the process, dozens of Canadian airmen are forced to bail out over occupied Belgium and France.

programme.title: War Story: Whistle for a Tiffy
programme.desc: From D-Day, Tactical Air Force fighter-bombers played a pivotal role in Allied battlefield success; Canadian soldiers knew they could always “whistle for a Tiffy”.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Harold & Armani
programme.desc: Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Daisy & Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chitara & Priscilla
programme.desc: Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 114
programme.desc: Bryan and Megan have been best friends for 10 years and he can no longer keep his feeling contained. Kenise thinks that she and James can be more than workout buddies.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 218
programme.desc: Andrew shows his true feelings when he tells his best friend that he likes her. Myke worries his feelings for Seanna could ruin their friendship.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 120
programme.desc: Franklin needs to let Erica, his friend of 5 years, know how he really feels about her. Wayne, a rapper, reveals his true feelings to Megan.

programme.title: The Hills: With This Ring... / A Night At The Opera
programme.desc: Just as Heidi's apology didn't make the cut in the last episode, Spencer's hope to elope falls flat when he shares his latest bright idea with Heidi! Whitney goes on a date with a trainer.

programme.title: The Hills: Once a Player / Finale
programme.desc: Couples have a habit of making up and breaking up on The Hills, but Lauren still finds herself in relationship limbo with Brody! (S3, ep17)

programme.title: The Hills: Paris Changes Everything
programme.desc: Lauren and Whitney arrive in Paris, where they are about to cover the "Crillon Ball" for Teen Vogue magazine. Heidi visits her mum in snowy Colorado. (S3, ep19)

programme.title: The Hills: Back to L.A. / An Unexpected Friend
programme.desc: After their week in Paris, Lauren and Whitney are back home and have to deal with what happened. Will Whitney be able to follow her dream and change her career? (S3, ep20)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killer
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Flip Side
programme.desc: Sal Mineo guest stars as a ruthless young operator who heads up an international narcotics ring which the IMF attempts to break up on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: My Friend, My Enemy
programme.desc: Special-guest star Jill Haworth portrays a glamorous double agent, who uses her feminine wiles on Paris to set him up for an enemy plot on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Innocent
programme.desc: Christopher Connelly guest stars as a non-cooperative young computer genius who has "dropped out" of society, but is desperately needed by the IMF to complete their assignment on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Decoy
programme.desc: Phelps falls in love with a woman that the IMF has been assigned to bring out of an iron curtain country over the seemingly insurmountable obstacles set in their way by the country's secret police in the "Decoy"

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 3 Finale Special: Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 1
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the Teen Moms in front of a live audience. Jenelle sits down with Jace's dad for the first time in years and Chelsea continues to hold on to Adam despite her father's frustrations.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 3 Finale Special: Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 2
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the Teen Moms in front of a live studio audience. Leah reveals some tragic news about her pregnancy and Kailyn struggles to accept Jo's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Looking for Love
programme.desc: Teen mum Farrah starts dating against her family's wishes while Maci begins planning her wedding. Catelynn moves back home with her parents and Amber's anxiety gets the best of her.

programme.title: Teen Mom: How Many Chances?
programme.desc: Maci contemplates breaking up with her fiancé, while Farrah starts dating a new guy despite her family's disapproval. Meanwhile, Amber and Catelynn both face personal issues.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Fallout
programme.desc: Catelynn's family clashes over her choices while Amber and her fiancé come to blows. Farrah learns that dating isn't easy, and Maci struggles to balance motherhood and school.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Moving On
programme.desc: Amber and Gary's arguing finally reaches a boiling point, while Catelynn struggles to find a home when her mother moves away. Newly-single mum Maci has a change of heart.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: By Night & By Day
programme.desc: By Night & By Day: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Terror of The World
programme.desc: Terror of the World: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Up in Flames 1936-1940
programme.desc: Up in Flames 1936-1940: At the end of 1939, the German Army invades Poland. Examine how Hitler succeeded in pushing through his rearmament and war plans relatively unhindered.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942
programme.desc: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942: In the shadow of the war, the Nazi regime gradually advances its "final solution to the Jewish problem", culminating in the Holocaust.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Paddlefish
programme.desc: This week, wardens encounter a crowd after busting a couple of antler poachers, crack down on anglers who are cheating the system during paddlefish season, and one warden deals with a rowdy group of partying campers.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Justice
programme.desc: This week, a five year old poacher case comes to a close and a grizzly bear has wardens on full alert. Then, wardens converge on Helena for their annual convention where they have a little fun.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Wildfire
programme.desc: This week on Wardens, we're tracking down a pesky bear who has been digging through the neighbors trash. In another region, we're citing several people for fishing without a license.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Trespass
programme.desc: This week, Montana Game Wardens are on the lookout for illegal hunters, some by trespassing, others by hunting too early in the day, hunting from vehicles, or taking spike elk.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Summer Recreation
programme.desc: This week, we're near Seeley Lake, Montana, as the wardens from Region 2 are kept busy with the summer recreation crowd.

programme.title: Aliens In USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Texas UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Scared to Death, Texas UFO, Butch Cassidy and Sibling Search & Update.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Underwear/Francine Frensky, Olympic Rider
programme.desc: Arthur thinks it's hilarious when Binky Barnes' pants split during class--until he starts having nightmares about it happening to him. Then, Francine secretly dreams of being an Olympic equestrienne, but first she has to learn to ride.

programme.title: Arthur: Fernfern and the Secret of Moose Mountain/Thanks a Lot, Binky
programme.desc: Fern can't wait to climb Moose Mountain so that she can have adventures like Zutzut, the famous comic-book hero! Then, Binky decides to become "No More Mr. Nice Guy" after not getting thanked for saving Rattles from a dangerous stunt.

programme.title: Arthur: I'm A Poet/The Scare-Your-Pants-Off Club
programme.desc: Challenged by Fern to enter a poetry contest, Arthur and his friends each write a poem to be judged by the famous poet Jack Prelutsky. Then, Arthur and his friends develop a consuming passion for the Scare-Your-Pants-Off books.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Eyes/Francine's Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: For some reason, Arthur isn't doing very well in school anymore. Maybe he just needs some glasses? Problem is, Arthur hates having to wear them. And it's school picture day and Muffy is determined that Francine will look her best.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Chicken Pox/Sick As A Dog
programme.desc: The circus is in town and the whole family's excited—until Arthur gets CHICKEN POX! Will he recover in time? Then, Arthur's worst fears come true when poor, sick Pal has to sleep overnight at the vet's office. Could it be something he did?

programme.title: Arthur: Silent Treatment/Kung Fool
programme.desc: When shy George wonders if any of his friends notice him, he decides he won’t speak to anyone until they do! Fern volunteers to help an elderly neighbor with his household chores, and then discovers his past life as a Kung Fu celebrity.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond
programme.desc: With the community pool closed for repairs and the temperature on the rise, Arthur and D.W. need a place to keep cool. Then, Grandma Thora takes in a stray: an adorable little dog named...Killer?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play It Safe!
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Coming on Strong
programme.desc: Exercise is good for everybody and every body! From running to touching toes to jumping jacks to some favorite songs and games, Barney and his friends grow strong while having fun with exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns a lesson about bragging when, playing superhero CAPTAIN PICKLES, he tells everyone that he can leap over the moon!

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Honor
programme.desc: Leobreaker disobeys Optimus' direct orders and attacks Scourge. Although Scourge now respects Leobreaker, the incident has caused a rift between him and Optimus...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Primal
programme.desc: Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trust
programme.desc: In an attempt to confuse the Decepticons, Optimus makes duplicate cyber keys for each Autobot. Meanwhile Dr. Suzuki makes an amazing discovery at the North Pole.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trap
programme.desc: The secret history of Earth and Cybertron is revealed with the awakening of monster-hunting Autobot Smokescreen/Crosswise. Meanwhile the Autobots are drawn into a cavern filled with ancient Decepticons...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Invasion
programme.desc: Starscream unleashes the ancient Decepticons in an attempt to find Earth's Cyber Planet Key, Optimus leads the Autobots in battle...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Retreat
programme.desc: The Minicons rescue the kids from the military, while Sideways learns the location of the Autobots' Earth base and leads every Decepticon to Coby's home town...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Revelation
programme.desc: Scourge frees Megatron from Starscream's trap and heads toward Earth. The Autobots must deal with Megatron and locating Starscream's location at the same time.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Critical
programme.desc: Just as all hope is lost, the light of Primus shines down on the fallen Autobot warriors (Scattershot, Red Alert, and Hot Shot) and resurrects them.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Assault
programme.desc: A three-way battle unfolds between the Decepticons, the Autobots, and Starscream's forces. Then, an Autobot warrior named Wing Saber appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Starscream
programme.desc: With the Autobots closing in, Starscream unleashes the Omega Lock's power and grows to a tremendous size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: United
programme.desc: Override, Evac, and Leobreaker are sent to help the Cybertron Defense team on Cybertron. Megatron's Decepticons follow as well as Thunderblast who joins Megatron. Optimus and Wing Saber combine and overpower Starscream.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children feed some birds and watch them playing on the bird table. In Teletubbyland, it's timer for Tubby Custard, but Dipsy spills his all over a Tubby Seat. No-one wants to sit in the Tubby Custard, so Noo-Noo tidies it up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children looking on a beach for Hermit Crabs. The Teletubbies love to play games. Today, they are playing a coming and going game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have trouble getting out of bed. The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children feeding swans.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po counts to three. The Teletubbies watch Sam have a ride in a helicopter. Laa-Laa's ball gets stuck up a tree and three magic ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes the Teletubbies laugh. They watch some children exploring the colour green. The Teletubbies love green.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky is looking for the other Teletubbies. He can’t see any of them so he shouts out ‘Big Hug’ and all the Teletubbies come running for a big hug.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little girl have her hair braided by her mum. They put different coloured bands in her hair. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky can't sleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies watch some children making hay. A tree appears in Teletubbyland and the Noo-Noo tidies up all the Teletubbies favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run across the hills to say "Eh-oh" and watch some children playing tennis. Laa-Laa and Po love to play with the ball. They roll, throw and kick it to each other.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a hiding game, Dipsy shuts his eyes and the other Tubbies hide from him. But Dipsy can't find them, so the Noo Noo helps him.

programme.title: Knights of Can-A-Lot
programme.desc: Bob, Wendy and the team get a big surprise when Bob's father Robert comes to visit. When stern Ms Chalmers from the National Heritage asks Bob to renovate the old castle a case of mistaken identity leaves Bob’s father in charge!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: There is great excitement at Bob’s yard when his new metal detector is delivered. He plans to use it to find a burst pipe in Farmer Pickles’ field, and promises Muck that afterwards they will hunt for buried treasure.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is having problems with mice eating his barley seed so he asks Bob to build a seed store to keep it safe. Whilst Bob is working, Farmer Pickles decides to go and buy some replacement seed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day. The team are building Farmer Pickles new factory which will turn sunflowers into sunflower oil. Everyone is excited to meet Marjorie, who arrives by bicycle. Marjorie has been brought on board by Farmer Pickles to manage the factory.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building a pedestrian crossing. Mrs Percival, meanwhile, has asked Molly to paint a mural of a jungle scene in the school playground.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are building a special flat-packed eco-home for Marjorie. When Muck and Benny spot Marjorie’s canvas tent and Spud’s straw-house, they wonder what else houses can be made from.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Pam Goody is running out of money to complete the Arts Centre renovations and Molly suggests holding a fashion show to raise funds. Pam thinks this a wonderful idea and asks Molly to organise it. Bob is, of course, just the man to build a catwalk.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis needs Bob to replace an old rotten beam in his cottage. The gang set off for Mr Ellis’s and Pilchard sneaks along – she knows that cottages are popular with mice! At the cottage, Mr Ellis reports some strange goings-on at the cottage.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a marshland walkway with his Dad’s help. Benny hears that the marsh is ‘like a jungle’ and becomes determined to finds some jungle animals like tigers. Every time he spots one, however, it turns out to be something very ordinary.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are replacing some old pipes outside the town hall. Molly, meanwhile, is practicing for her first aid exam with a reluctant JJ as guinea pig. When Wendy calls JJ’s yard to order a special pipe and Molly offers to deliver it.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A new machine has come to the Valley – Packer the Delivery Truck. He’s to work with Farmer Pickles team. Farmer Pickles gives Packer his jobs and he sets off on his first delivery round.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is desperate to help Bob build a drying barn for Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. Scruffty is also excited about the building job and runs and jumps about getting in everyone’s way.

programme.title: Scrambler to the Rescue
programme.desc: Its winter in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his team are building a concert hall in time for a special winter celebration. Scrambler is especially keen to help – but is frustrated that there’s nothing for an energetic quad-bike to do!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is replacing a potting shed on Mr Beasley’s allotment. In the old shed is a chest which Mr Beasley doesn’t need any more. Meanwhile Wendy calls at JJ’s for the materials for the new shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Team are converting Mr Sabatini’s windmill into a café. Roley is rolling the ground flat for all the tables and chairs while Bob makes the awnings. Roley hits trouble when molehills keep appearing where he’s just been rolling.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Paper cut-out man"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team travel to Durham in the northeast of England, to investigate a venue with many reports of strange activity. And for one team member, it will prove to be a night they won't easily forget.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Quite a nasty man"
programme.desc: Sara, Phil, and the rest of the AYH team investigate a venue in North Yorkshire that has a surprising history, which includes a famous former owner. And a strange occurrence has the whole team intrigued.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Stay calm, stay calm!"
programme.desc: A journey south to the county of Suffolk sees the AYH team investigating a building that has had multiple uses in its colourful history. With reports of a playful spirit and possible poltergeist activity, Sara and Jane get the fright of their lives.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Is anybody there?"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team heads to Wales, where they are given rare access to a restricted part of a venue. What will the team find during their overnight investigation, in a building that stretches back hundreds of years?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 1
programme.desc: Workhouses were not the best of places to be, so why would anyone stay after they had died? Yvette takes her team on a memorable journey to find out. For a few team members it was a night they will never forget as they are pushed to the very limits.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 2
programme.desc: Whatever was making itself known to the team earlier, continues in this episode as something seems to be following Yvette from the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette takes the Most Haunted team into the very haunted, disused attic at the top of this huge country mansion and are soon made to feel very unwelcome. Yvette is pushed to the limits and Karl is followed by a very heavily booted phantom.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life.

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door
programme.desc: Victoria Dane was accidently overdosed before an emergency surgery and flat-lined for more than seven minutes. While recovering, she starts to notice unusual occurrences. She fears that she’s opened a door to a paranormal world that can never be shut.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: House Of Sorrows
programme.desc: In 2012, Darrin and Jamie Shriver move into a home with tragic history. Darrin unwittingly invites dark entities back into the home threatening the safety of his wife and new baby. Paranormal investigators determine a demonic entity is in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Well To Hell
programme.desc: Mark Corvo finds a ceremonial alter in his attic. He reaches out to the Ghosts of New England Research Society for professional help. They believe tenants dabbling in the dark arts opened a portal to the other side and drew spirits to the location.

programme.title: A Haunting: Monster in the Apartment
programme.desc: A ghost attacks Morgan Knudsen in order to drive her out and get to her friend Bob.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed
programme.desc: In the small town of Garden Grove, Iowa, Jennifer and Norman Rice with their son Andrew, purchase a majestic 19th century mansion. Soon after, Jennifer and Andrew begin experiencing paranormal activity while Norman is out of town on business.
